data.value: Automatic mode is not possibe to set(All keys must be in NORMAL and AUTO!)

data.value: Automatic mode is set(Step mode is disabled)!

data.value: Cyclic mode is not allowed while any control key is in Service mode!

data.value: Manual mode is not possibe to set(At least one SERVICE and one MANUAL keys must be in position!)

data.value: Manual mode is starting due service key combination (Manual / Service)

data.value: Step mode is required because Service key position is set!

data.value: Step mode is set or all are inactive!
